comment: This file is a valid example for a job template file to be provided with the Mallob option -job-template=<>. You may add any JSON fields of a usual job submission file and change the existing fields. Certain scheduling-specific fields will be overwritten by the job streamer when instantiating individual jobs.

When running Mallob with several clients (-c=<>), note that you can create different template files named like tj.json.0, tj.json.1, ... and then specify -job-template=tj.json so that the i-th client will use the file tj.json.<i>.
name: templated-job
